sources.title: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyar 2007 Dv DRip AAC 5.1 X 264

metadata.Plot: The Story Is About 3 Friends Rahul, Seema and Salman. Where Rahul's First Love Is Money And Seemas First Love Is Rahul And Salman First Love Is USA. Vicky's First love is Power, Who Is Genius But Criminal At Mind. Studied at The Same Campus, After Graduating They All Start Exploring Their Careers Using Their Talent, Vicky Get A Job With Underworld Don. Rahul Exploits The Rich And Gets Trapped Into A Dons Daughter Rajni 's Affair, Who Goes After To Marry Him At A Gun Point. Seema, An Homely Girl Who Loves Rahul. Salman Works Towards Fulfilling His Dream To Migrate USA And Seeks Financial Help From Rahul. Hyderabadi Comedy By Detectives.*Beautiful Music And A Clean Family Film. A must watch movie...
metadata.Writer: Ather Khan (story), Ather Khan, Ather Khan
